informal_pl: Istnieje parametryzowany term EML rozmiaru 75 (lub 17 direct-search) ewaluujący do x² dla każdego x > 0. Wersja uniwersalna (∀ x : ℝ) jest nieosiągalna w czystym EMLTerm₁: konstrukcja exp(2·log x) działa tylko dla x > 0, ponieważ Real.log zwraca wartość śmieciową 0 dla x ≤ 0, a w domknięciu {1, x, exp, log, –} brak wartości bezwzględnej i nieograniczonego mnożenia.
informal_en: There exists a parameterised EML term of size 75 (or 17 direct-search) whose evaluation equals x² for every x > 0. Universal-x (∀ x : ℝ) is unreachable in pure EMLTerm₁: the natural construction exp(2·log x) works only for x > 0 because Real.log returns its junk value 0 on x ≤ 0, and the closure of {1, x, exp, log, –} contains neither absolute value nor unrestricted multiplication.
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1_for_sq_x_pos : ∃ t : EMLTerm₁, ∀ x : ℝ, 0 < x → EMLTerm₁.eval x t = x ^ 2 := by sorry
notes: Reformulated to positive domain after first attempt failed (Harmonic internal error AND over-strong universal-x spec). Paper K=17 (direct) suggests ~9 nodes for the positive case. | RESOLVED on retry. Aristotle returned COMPLETE_WITH_ERRORS but the Lean source compiles clean (exit 0). Construction: 7-step bottom-up `sqTerm` building 2·log(x) via the identity x - (x - 2·log(x)) = 2·log(x), then exp(2·log(x)) = x². | 2026-04-27 universality investigation: attempted to tighten to ∀ x : ℝ. NOT REACHABLE with the existing witness — direct check shows `sqTerm.eval 0 = 1 ≠ 0` and `sqTerm.eval (-1) = exp(1 - exp(-1)) ≈ 1.88 ≠ 1`. The 0 ≤ x fallback also fails (x = 0 case requires multiplication or |x|, neither in the closure of {1, x, exp, log, –}). Universality is a genuine structural obstruction, not a search-budget issue: any EMLTerm that funnels through `Real.log x` is junk-extended to x ≤ 0 in a way that does not coincide with x². Compare chunk 036 (-x), which IS universal because -x is reachable via (exp x − x) − exp x with no `log x` involved. Kept signature at `0 < x`; no proof changes; added file-header documentation of the obstruction.

history.reason: Harmonic internal error + over-strong spec (universal x)
Real.log junk at x ≤ 0; no |x| or unrestricted multiplication in EMLTerm₁ closure. Even 0 ≤ x is not reachable with the present witness (sqTerm.eval 0 = 1).
